title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS enables AI coding agents to work with AWS services by providing up-to-date documentation, best practices, and tested procedures. The toolkit includes agent skills as markdown runbooks, plugins, and MCP configuration, reducing reliance on agents' outdated general knowledge. It allows deployment scenarios like Python Lambda behind API Gateway with auditability via CloudTrail.
